title: CAR MODEL VARIANT detail page » BOOKS
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the CAR MODEL VARIANT detail page to show all connected BOOKS
So I can ...
description:
* The CAR MODEL VARIANT detail page contains a section with a list of all connected BOOKS.
* Each BOOK in the list is presented with its name and primary information.
* Each BOOK in the list contains a link to its detail page.
* Each BOOK in the list has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no BOOK connected to the CAR MODEL VARIANT then the section is not displayed at all.
